response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings 15+ years of polyglot engineering and has touched distributed, high-throughput systems, but the resume contains no evidence of the core competencies this role requires: experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature-flagging systems, telemetry foundations, statistical/experimental analysis, or growth engineering. His current staff-level scope and impact also fall short of the IC6 Principal bar, which demands multi-team architectural ownership and cross-org technical leadership at scale. General engineering depth does not compensate for the absence of domain expertise that is central to this position.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across C/C++, TypeScript, Java, and DLang satisfies the language breadth requirement
High-throughput microservices experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests per second) demonstrates real distributed-systems exposure
Active open-source tooling authorship (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, GISCollective) and public talks show initiative and a systems-building mindset
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere in the resume — the central technical domain of this role
No evidence of metrics instrumentation, telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, or data-driven growth engineering
Scope and impact appear senior/staff-level rather than Principal/IC6; no evidence of multi-team architectural ownership or cross-organizational technical leadership

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or measurement platform experience
